claims.text: 14. The method of treating inflammatory dermatosis in a human or animal suffering therefrom which method comprises locally or topically administering an effective amount of a compound as in claim 1.

indications.text:
DERMATOP Emollient Cream 0.1% is a medium-potency corticosteroid indicated for
the relief of the inflammatory and pruritic manifestations of corticosteroid responsive
dermatoses. DERMATOP Emollient Cream 0.1% may be used with caution in pediatric
patients 1 year of age or older. The safety and effic...
